product: Genie Space enhancements and bug fixes
tagline: Inspect (Public Preview): Inspect is now in Public Preview.
what_it_does: Inspect (Public Preview): Inspect is now in Public Preview. Inspect automatically improves standard Genie's accuracy by reviewing the initially generated SQL, authoring smaller SQL statements to verify specific aspects of the query, and generating improved SQL as needed. Agent mode is available to more accounts: Agent mode uses multi step reasoning and hypothesis testing to answer both straightforward data questions and complex business questions.
why_it_matters: Inspect automatically improves standard Genie's accuracy by reviewing the initially generated SQL, authoring smaller SQL statements to verify specific aspects of the query, and generating improved SQL as needed.
